------------------------------------------------------------------------
Layer Stack:
     root.usd

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Group>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /Group
    variant.usd          /Group
    variant.usd          /Group{v=x}
    relocates.usd        /Group
    chargroup.usd        /CHARGROUP

Variant Selections:
    {v = x}

Child names:
     ['Model']

Prohibited child names:
     ['CHARACTER', 'Character']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </Group/Model>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /Group/Model
    variant.usd          /Group/Character
    variant.usd          /Group{v=x}Character
    relocates.usd        /Group/Character
    chargroup.usd        /CHARGROUP/CHARACTER
